positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration featuring a group of diverse whimsical forest spirits (gnomes, dryads, sprites) gathered in a bioluminescent clearing. The composition is centered, with the spirits arranged in a natural semi-circle, creating strong visual flow. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and modern graphic illustration, utilizing thick, clean linework and sophisticated color blocking. Focus on deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with glowing, ethereal accents (cyan, gold). The flora must have exaggerated, stylized shapes, appearing almost architectural. The mood is enchanting and joyful. The overall print must be highly detailed, vector-like, and designed for a central, crisp print on fabric. Studio lighting, high contrast, crisp edges, maximal detail.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, amateur drawing, muted colors, photorealistic, grayscale
